evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Design a data quality control system (Data Quality & Observability)
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour signals (data quality control system, observability, Great Expectations/Elementary) dominate with no velocity/speed language present.
evidence.domain_risk: Lead the integration of new data sources (TikTok Shop, Shopify, Advertising)
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: eCommerce/retail business context with P&L dashboard consumption, but no explicit financial reporting, regulatory, or compliance language.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Architect and deploy a multi-layered Data Warehouse system (from Raw to Gold Layer)
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: A multi-layered Raw-to-Gold data warehouse, standardized metric layer, and self-service BI platform indicate an established, growing data function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Proficient in SQL on Columnar Database (ClickHouse preferred)
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific tools (ClickHouse, dbt, Apache Superset, Airflow, Great Expectations, Elementary) give a concrete picture of the daily technical work.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Build a BI Self-service Platform for Marketing, P&L, and Operations teams
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Marketing (commercial), P&L (finance), and Operations are named as roughly equal-weight consumers of the self-service BI platform, giving mixed orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level: Establish a standardized Metric Layer, defining and governing core business metrics
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Establishing and governing the metric layer, plus leading new data source integration, are explicit direction-setting, strategic responsibilities.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No AI tool or AI infrastructure mention appears anywhere in the extracted JD text.
evidence.testing_framing: Design a data quality control system (Data Quality & Observability)
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data quality/observability system design is named as an owned responsibility with an explicit design verb, not just tools listed in requirements.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Design a data quality control system (Data Quality & Observability)
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Data quality and observability are a stated concern throughout, but framed as pipeline/reporting reliability rather than compliance or regulatory risk.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Architect and deploy a multi-layered Data Warehouse system (from Raw to Gold Layer)
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The role mixes architecting new multi-layer warehouse infrastructure with integrating new data sources into an existing self-service platform.
evidence.loss_aversion: Design a data quality control system (Data Quality & Observability) — reflects concern for data reliability rather than compliance or regulatory risk.
